message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first list_panes in snapshot periodic probe (tick 284)

Migrates the periodic `list_panes` probe inside the snapshot engine's
`run_periodic` closure (main.rs L15536) to `list_panes_with_cx`:

- `wez.list_panes().await.ok()` →
  `wez.list_panes_with_cx(&probe_cx, ...).await.ok()`

The probe runs every `snapshot.interval` to discover panes for
checkpoint capture. Previously the pane-enumeration was cx-insensitive
inside the spawned periodic task. Now uses `Cx::current()` resolved
per-invocation so the probe picks up whatever Cx is active on the
snapshot engine task's worker thread — consistent with the tick-203
pattern applied elsewhere in spawned task bodies.

This is the last ambient `wez.list_panes()` call site in `ft watch`
runtime bootstrap spawned-task bodies.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean.

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 98 (187-284).
main.rs cross-crate migration total: 179 sites (178 before + 1).
frankenterm-core internal sites: 47 (unchanged this tick).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
